additionalDescription: They also include som anthropophony classes. Files come at different sample rates but are all resampled to 96 kHz.
description: ECOSoundSet is a large-scale insect bioacoustic dataset for automated acoustic identification of Orthoptera and Cicadidae in European soundscapes. The dataset contains weakly labelled and finely annotated recordings from 200 Orthoptera species and 24 Cicadidae species collected across North, Central and temperate Western Europe. Strong annotations include temporal and frequency localization of insect vocalisations and predefined train/validation/test splits for machine learning workflows.
locality: Andorra, Belgium, Denmark, France, Germany, Ireland, Luxembourg, Monaco, Netherlands, Switzerland, United Kingdom
name: ECOSoundSet
title: ECOSoundSet: a finely annotated dataset for the automated acoustic identification of Orthoptera and Cicadidae in North, Central and temperate Western Europe
